description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:latest Docker image globally and sets the CARGO_HOME variable to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/cargo. Enable a cache of the cargo/ directory for all jobs except the deploy job. Define three stages: check, release, and deploy. In the check stage add a run-build job that runs rustup component add clippy in before_script, then executes rustc --version && cargo --version, cargo test, and cargo clippy -- --deny warnings, and runs only on the master branch and merge request pipelines. In the release stage add a release-build job that runs cargo build --release, stores target/release/mailin-server as an artifact, and runs only on the master branch. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that uses the kroniak/ssh-client:3.15 image, runs eval $(ssh-agent -s), adds the SSH_DEPLOY_KEY with ssh-add, installs tar and zstd via apk, disables caching, depends on release-build, and executes SSH_DEPLOY_USER=$SSH_DEPLOY_USER SSH_DEPLOY_PORT=$SSH_DEPLOY_PORT mailin-server/deploy/deploy.sh, and runs only on the master branch.
